title: Education
description: Engaging with students and the public to share our science and foster a passion for synthetic biology.

sections.text: We developed and delivered a series of workshops for local high school students. The workshops introduced the core concepts of synthetic biology, DNA, and genetic engineering through interactive presentations and a hands-on activity involving strawberry DNA extraction.

To make synthetic biology more accessible, we created a series of animated videos and infographics explaining our project and its underlying principles. These materials were shared on social media and our project website, reaching a broad audience.
